source_metadata.title: 2025/08/21 - FD (Part 2)
source_metadata.description:
Thursday, 21 August 2025 | Foreign Affairs, Defence and Trade Committee

Briefing on meetings with representative counterparts and government officials

Hearing of evidence 
Submitters list: 
Viet Nam Delegation - Committee on National Defence, Security and Foreign Affairs, National Assembly 

Senior Lieutenant General Le Tan Toi, Chairman
Lieutenant General Nguyen Minh Duc, Deputy Chairman
Lieutenant General Do Quang Than, Deputy Chairman
Major General Vu Xuan Hung, Permanent Member
Lieutenant General Nguyen Xuan Dat, Member
Major General Nguyen Tien Nam, Member
Mr. Phan Quang Vinh, Deputy Director
Mr. Nguyen Van Khoa Diem, Secretary to Chairman
Ms. Pham Thi Ngoc Ha, Senior Expert
Ms. Tran Minh Thai, Senior Expert 


Viet Nam Delegation - Other Members

Mr. Phan Minh Giang, Ambassador to New Zealand
Senior Colonel Nguyen Ngoc Huy, Viet Nam Defence Attache
